title: Number of Subsequences That Satisfy the Given Sum Condition
titleCn: 满足条件的子序列数目

testcases.input: nums = [3,5,6,7], target = 9 Output: 4 Explanation: There are 4 subsequences that satisfy the condition. [3] -> Min value + max value <= target (3 + 3 <= 9) [3,5] -> (3 + 5 <= 9) [3,5,6] -> (3 + 6 <= 9) [3,6] -> (3 + 6 <= 9)
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: There are 4 subsequences that satisfy the condition. [3] -> Min value + max value <= target (3 + 3 <= 9) [3,5] -> (3 + 5 <= 9) [3,5,6] -> (3 + 6 <= 9) [3,6] -> (3 + 6 <= 9)

testcases.input: nums = [3,3,6,8], target = 10 Output: 6 Explanation: There are 6 subsequences that satisfy the condition. (nums can have repeated numbers). [3] , [3] , [3,3], [3,6] , [3,6] , [3,3,6]
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: There are 6 subsequences that satisfy the condition. (nums can have repeated numbers). [3] , [3] , [3,3], [3,6] , [3,6] , [3,3,6]

testcases.input: nums = [2,3,3,4,6,7], target = 12 Output: 61 Explanation: There are 63 non-empty subsequences, two of them do not satisfy the condition ([6,7], [7]). Number of valid subsequences (63 - 2 = 61).
testcases.expectedOutput: 61 Explanation: There are 63 non-empty subsequences, two of them do not satisfy the condition ([6,7], [7]). Number of valid subsequences (63 - 2 = 61).
